bead.title: checks: residual production-reachability — internal/agent execute-bead flow
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Current deadcode RTA on 2026-05-15 still reports a large execute-bead residual cluster as unreachable from the production graph, so `ddx-83440482` cannot close from current-tree evidence.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
`.ddx/executions/20260515T210515-1a20052a/production-reachability-final.json` reports residual dead symbols across the execute-bead lifecycle files, including `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead.go:1267` (`appendRateLimitRetryEvent`), `execute_bead_conflict_recovery.go:90` (`ShouldAttemptConflictRecovery`), `execute_bead_loop.go:717` (`newProgressEvent`), `execute_bead_no_changes_verify.go:38` (`ParseNoChangesRationale`), `execute_bead_orchestrator.go:176` (`LandBeadResult`), `execute_bead_post_review.go:86` (`RunPostMergeReview`), `execute_bead_review.go:267` (`SelectReviewerPolicy`), `execute_bead_review_fixable_gap.go:42` (`reviewFixableGapEventBody`), and `execute_bead_review_terminal.go:27` (`classifyTerminalReviewBlock`).

PROPOSED FIX
Resolve every symbol currently listed for the `execute_bead*.go` files in the committed artifact. WIRE APIs that are supposed to drive the real execution/review path; DELETE speculative or stranded helpers that never became part of the runtime flow. If any symbol still needs deferred investigation after ~15 minutes, annotate it with `// wiring:pending <follow-up-bead-id>` and file the narrower follow-up before closing this bead.

NON-SCOPE
- Do not touch compare/candidate-cycle/support residuals; those clusters are tracked separately.
- Do not change the production-reachability protocol or checker implementation.
bead.acceptance:
1. Every symbol currently listed for this cluster in `.ddx/executions/20260515T210515-1a20052a/production-reachability-final.json` is either wired into the production graph or deleted.
2. `cd cli && go run golang.org/x/tools/cmd/deadcode@v0.42.0 ./... | rg 'internal/agent/execute_bead'` returns no hits.
3. Any remaining `// wiring:pending` annotation created while resolving this cluster cites an open follow-up bead.
4. Decisions log written to `.ddx/executions/<run-id>/decisions.md` records WIRE|DELETE|PENDING for each listed symbol.
5. `cd cli && go test ./...` passes.
6. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
